name: Embrace Change Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company and to we, us, and our refer to Embrace Change Acquisition Corp. Introduction We are a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on March3, 2021. Exempted companies are Cayman Islands companies wishing to conduct business outside the Cayman Islands and, as such, are exempted from complying with certain provisions of the Companies Act.
